title: make admin drafts inbox responsive on mobile
description:
## Summary
- Replaces fixed `240px 320px 1fr` grid with a responsive stack at ≤1100px so the detail panel is no longer off-screen on phones/tablets.
- Filters rail flattens into a horizontal grid; orig/Vorschlag two-col collapses to one column below 700px; opening a draft scroll-snaps the detail panel into view with a "← Liste" back button.

## Test plan
- [ ] `web.mentolder.de/admin/knowledge/drafts` at 375×812 (iPhone) — alle drei Bereiche scrollbar, kein horizontaler Overflow
- [ ] Tap auf einen Draft scrollt zur Detailansicht; "← Liste" springt zurück
- [ ] Desktop ≥1100px sieht aus wie vorher (3-Spalten-Grid)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
